metadata.name: ipay_protocol
metadata.description: iPay - The Square of PayFi. Payments + Loyalty + AI on Solana.

accounts.name: payment_mint
docs: The SPL token mint used for payment (e.g. USDC)

accounts.name: payer_token_account
docs: Payer's token account for the payment mint

accounts.name: merchant_token_account
docs: Merchant's token account for the payment mint

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token program for the payment mint (e.g. Token-2022 or SPL Token)

accounts.name: loyalty_token_program
docs: Token program for the loyalty mint

accounts.name: payment_record
docs: The original payment record being refunded

accounts.name: merchant_owner
docs: The merchant owner who authorizes the refund -- must be a signer

accounts.name: stake_vault
docs: Vault to hold staked iPAY tokens

errors.name: NameTooLong
errors.msg: Name must be 32 characters or less

errors.name: DescriptionTooLong
errors.msg: Description must be 128 characters or less

errors.name: CategoryTooLong
errors.msg: Category must be 32 characters or less

errors.name: InvalidMultiplier
errors.msg: Loyalty multiplier must be between 100 (1x) and 1000 (10x)

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than 0

errors.name: MemoTooLong
errors.msg: Memo must be 64 characters or less

errors.name: MerchantInactive
errors.msg: Merchant is not active

errors.name: RefundExceedsPayment
errors.msg: Refund amount exceeds original payment

errors.name: UnauthorizedRefund
errors.msg: Only the merchant owner can process refunds

errors.name: PaymentMerchantMismatch
errors.msg: Payment does not belong to this merchant

errors.name: InvalidRefundRecipient
errors.msg: Refund recipient does not match original payer

errors.name: SupplyCapExceeded
errors.msg: Loyalty token supply cap would be exceeded

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: InvalidFeeBps
errors.msg: Platform fee basis points must be <= 10000

errors.name: AmountTooLarge
errors.msg: Payment amount exceeds maximum allowed

errors.name: PlatformPaused
errors.msg: Platform is currently paused

errors.name: EscrowNotFunded
errors.msg: Escrow is not in funded status

errors.name: EscrowNotReleasable
errors.msg: Escrow cannot be released yet

errors.name: EscrowNotDisputed
errors.msg: Escrow is not in disputed status

errors.name: UnauthorizedDispute
errors.msg: Only the payer can dispute an escrow

errors.name: InvalidReleaseTime
errors.msg: Release time must be in the future

errors.name: IntervalTooShort
errors.msg: Subscription interval must be at least 3600 seconds (1 hour)

errors.name: InvalidCycles
errors.msg: Invalid number of subscription cycles

errors.name: SubscriptionInactive
errors.msg: Subscription is not active

errors.name: SubscriptionMaxCycles
errors.msg: Subscription has reached maximum cycles

errors.name: SubscriptionNotDue
errors.msg: Subscription payment is not yet due

errors.name: UnauthorizedCancel
errors.msg: Only the subscriber can cancel

errors.name: TipExceedsAmount
errors.msg: Tip amount cannot exceed payment amount

errors.name: InvalidSplitBps
errors.msg: Split basis points must be between 1 and 9999

errors.name: InvalidVerificationTier
errors.msg: Invalid merchant verification tier (0-3)

errors.name: LockTooShort
errors.msg: Stake lock duration must be at least 1 day

errors.name: LockTooLong
errors.msg: Stake lock duration cannot exceed 1 year

errors.name: StakeNotActive
errors.msg: Stake is not active

errors.name: StakeLocked
errors.msg: Stake is still locked
